chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS C.P No.S-70 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A No.10730/2019. 3. For hearing of main case. 03.03.2026 Mr. Wishan Das Kolhi, advocate a/w petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Shareef Solangi, Assistant A.G Sindh. = After arguing the matter at length, learned counsel for the petitioner, under the instructions, state that he would be satisfied if the matter is remanded back to the trial court for decision on merits strictly in accordance with law. In view of the above and by consent, the instant petition is allowed and the impugned Order dated 17.09.2019 passed by learned District Judge, Tharparkar @ Mithi in Civil Revision Application No.06/2019 and Order dated 31.07.2019 passed by learned Senior Civil Judge-I, Mithi passed in F.C Suit No.289/2015 are set-aside and the plaint is restored to its original position and the matter is remanded back to the learned trial court, with direction to conclude the trial within a period of 90 days from the date of receipt of this Order, whereby no unnecessary adjournment shall be granted to any of the parties, however, subject to cost of Rs.40,000/- to be paid by the petitioner within three days to the General Secretary of High Court Bar Association, Mirpurkhas specifically for the purpose of purchasing books for the Bar Association and receipt of such deposit to be filed by the petitioner in this file. The instant petition is disposed of alongwith listed application in above terms. Copy of this Order be sent to the General Secretary of High Court Bar Association, Mirpurkhas for information.

The instant petition is disposed of alongwith listed application in above terms. Copy of this Order be sent to the General Secretary of High Court Bar Association, Mirpurkhas for information. JUDGE *Faisal*
